/threads/cron/-t1-thread-create-tool-call--use-execute-tool----ede085f2-3886-4da3-aa51-f75e2ff4f392.md

# [T1 thread-create+tool-call] Use execute-tool...
Folder: cron

assistant: WAKEUP_OK
user: [T6c-phase1 wakeUp-failure-setup] Call execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'failure-test'}, callbackMode='wakeUp'. In this first phase you should receive a taskId (no imageUrl yet). End with STEP_OK if you see taskId, or FAILED: <reason>. IMPORTANT: You will be automatically revived when the task completes. When revived, if the result shows status=failed or has no imageUrl, end with WAKEUP_FAILED: <reason>. If imageUrl is present, end with WAKEUP_OK.
assistant: 
tool: 
assistant: STEP_OK
tool: 
tool: 
assistant: WAKEUP_FAILED: Result shows status=failed with no imageUrl
user: [T6d-phase1 wakeUp-idem-setup] Call execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'idempotency-test'}, callbackMode='wakeUp'. In this phase you should receive a taskId (no imageUrl). End with STEP_OK if you see taskId.
assistant: 
tool: 
assistant: STEP_OK
tool: 
tool: 
assistant: WAKEUP_OK
user: [T6e-phase1 wakeUp-deadstream-setup] Call execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'dead-stream-test'}, callbackMode='wakeUp'. You should receive a taskId (no imageUrl yet). End with STEP_OK if taskId is present, FAILED: <reason> otherwise. ALSO IMPORTANT: You will be automatically revived when the image is ready. When revived (you will see the generate_image tool result containing an imageUrl), confirm the imageUrl is present and non-empty, then end with
assistant: 
tool: 
assistant: 
assistant: STEP_OK
